query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) 
SELECT l.id, CONCAT('Question 1: ', l.title, '?'), 'multiple_choice', '["Option A","Option B","Option C","Option D"]', 'Option A', 1, NOW(), NOW() FROM lessons l
UNION ALL SELECT l.id, CONCAT('Question 2: ', l.title, '?'), 'multiple_choice', '["Option A","Option B","Option C","Option D"]', 'Option B', 2, NOW(), NOW() FROM lessons l
UNION ALL SELECT l.id, CONCAT('Question 3: ', l.title, '?'), 'multiple_choice', '["Option A","Option B","Option C","Option D"]', 'Option C', 3, NOW(), NOW() FROM lessons l;
